claims: Implemented Alice::Network for generalized curl fetching.
Refactored TilesetLoader to construct Google 3D Tiles URL and fetch root JSON.
Implemented TilesetTest to verify handshake and metadata extraction.
Resolved zlib/opennurbs symbol collision via /FORCE:MULTIPLE linker flag.
Verified network handshake successfully reaches Google servers (receives 403 due to disabled API).
optimization_metrics: Zero heap allocations in fetch callback (std::vector::resize only). O(log n) logic ready for spatial tile traversal.
